comment: Generic-failure ledger for observed grafana/ corpus queries: cases that hit an unregistered/unsupported construct BEFORE any NotYetSupported boundary, so the parser can only surface a generic error today. Each entry names the first blocking construct (registry id) and the sub-issues that must land before the query parses. Monotone-shrink only: an entry whose case starts parsing Ok or reaching a named NotYetSupported boundary is stale and fails the harness (conformance.rs::grafana_cases_are_ok_named_or_ledgered).
